subcodes.first_line: I beseech Thee, O God of Names and Ruler over all things, by the lights of Thy Kingdom and Thy Dominion, that Thou mayest cause to descend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسئلک یا اله الاسماء و المهیمن علی الاشیاء بانوار ملکوتک و جبروتک بان تنزل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
